author: Customer_John
text: I'm experiencing issues with the login feature. Getting an error 401 on every attempt.

author: Support_Agent_Lisa
text: Sorry to hear that! Let me help. Can you tell me your browser and OS details?

author: Customer_John
text: Chrome on Windows 11. I've tried clearing cache but still doesn't work.

author: Support_Agent_Lisa
text: Thanks! Try resetting your password. If that doesn't work, I can escalate this.

author: Customer_John
text: Great! Password reset worked! Thank you so much for the quick help.

author: Customer_Sarah
text: The mobile app keeps crashing when I try to upload photos. Very frustrating!

author: Support_Agent_Mike
text: I'm sorry you're experiencing this. What's your app version and phone model?

author: Customer_Sarah
text: App version 3.2.1, iPhone 14 Pro. It happens with any photo, even small ones.

author: Support_Agent_Mike
text: This might be a known issue. Can you try updating to version 3.2.2? Should be available now.

author: Customer_Sarah
text: Updated and it's working perfectly now! You're amazing, thanks!

author: Customer_Tom
text: I want to cancel my subscription but can't find the option in settings.

author: Support_Agent_Lisa
text: I can help with that. Go to Account > Subscription > Manage Plan. You'll see the cancel option there.

author: Customer_Tom
text: Found it! One more thing - can I get a refund for the current month?

author: Support_Agent_Lisa
text: Unfortunately, our policy only allows refunds within 7 days of purchase. Your subscription is older.

author: Customer_Tom
text: Understand. Well, thanks anyway. I appreciate the clarification on the policy.

author: Customer_Emma
text: Your service is amazing! I've been using it for 2 years and love every feature.

author: Support_Agent_Mike
text: Thank you so much for the kind words! We're glad you're enjoying the service. Any suggestions?

author: Customer_Emma
text: Maybe add team collaboration features? That would be perfect for our workflow.

author: Support_Agent_Mike
text: Great suggestion! I'll pass this to our product team. Thanks for the feedback!
